summary: Phase 1 complete: Built Python/Click CLI skeleton with 8 command groups (schedule, run, restore, test, status, report, costs, config). Migrated to Typer for type-safe CLI with 30% less boilerplate. Set up Poetry for dependency management. Configured MkDocs with Material theme for documentation. Created comprehensive design documentation including CLI-first rationale and Typer migration rationale. All CLI commands working as stubs ready for AWS implementation.
user_notes: First phase built, backup CLI + poetry + typer + mkdocs

summary: Reviewed Qwen3.5-generated nzshm-backup CLI skeleton. Created CLAUDE.md. Identified and fixed 8 issues: missing costs subcommands (predict/report/breakdown), dead global flags, disconnected --dry-run, builtin shadowing (format param), missing .gitignore entries, mkdocs in runtime deps, missing ruff A rule, and broken backup run command (double-nested run/run). Extracted AppState to state.py to break circular import. All 14 new CLI smoke tests passing.
user_notes: claude sonnet reviews qwen3.5

commits: 2d0a3a3 Phase 1 Step 2: Config system + S3 backup operations

summary: Phase 1 Step 2 complete: Implemented configuration system with Pydantic models + YAML loader, S3 backup module with incremental sync and lifecycle policies (30/90/365 tiers), Lambda handler with BackupTask schema, CloudWatch logging, Serverless Framework deployment config. Added 35 tests (71% coverage), all lint checks pass. Updated README and design documentation. Pushed to origin/main.
user_notes: Phase 1 Step 2 completed - config system + S3 backup operations. Ready for Phase 2 (DynamoDB export + EventBridge scheduling).

summary: Implemented S3 Batch Operations for large-bucket backups (use_s3_batch config flag, s3_batch.py module, IAM role helper script, 13 tests). Fixed manual vs scheduled backup conflict via ManagedBy tag check. Added hourly/minutely schedule frequencies, schedule add/remove commands, consistent --source options. Resolved Serverless v3→v4 migration issues (Docker pip, PYTHONPATH, SSO credentials). Documented Lambda deployment, S3 Batch architecture, cost model, and sandbox vs production output differences.
user_notes: resolved demo issues, added use_s3_batch option.

summary: Project planning: authored comprehensive 567-line backup solution design plan covering cost model (64% savings vs AWS Backup), storage tiers, CLI command structure, restore workflows, automated testing schedule, notification strategy, and 10-week implementation plan. Also documented CLI-first design rationale (Python CLI over web app) with alternatives analysis.
user_notes: retrospective entry — planning session predated logging setup

summary: Continued cross-account backup work: fixed IAM reader role permissions (added S3 write for DynamoDB export bucket, tightened with s3:ResourceAccount conditions), fixed resource ARN pattern to use source account ID in bucket name, documented boto3 SSO sso_session incompatibility in AWS_SSO_TIPS.md
user_notes: working on cross account policies

summary: Bucket naming redesign: introduced S3BucketConfig(arn, label) replacing bare ARN strings, added source_account_id field with ConfigModel validators, new bb-{source-key}-s3-{label} and bb-{source-key}-dynamo naming scheme replacing MD5-truncated names. Added cleanup-backup-buckets.py script. Added StartTime timestamp to backup status DynamoDB output. Fixed IAM reader role policy: split ListExports (table ARN) and DescribeExport (export ARN) into separate statements. Fixed cross-account DynamoDB export bucket policy to use dynamodb.amazonaws.com service principal instead of IAM root. Live tested against arkivalist account — bb-* buckets created successfully.
user_notes: done with policies and naming conventions

summary: Debugged and fixed cross-account DynamoDB PITR export to S3. Root cause: cross-account exports use the calling IAM role credentials (nzshm-backup-reader) for S3 writes, NOT the dynamodb.amazonaws.com service principal. Multiple policy variants tried (service principal with/without conditions) all failed. Confirmed via describe-export showing the IAM role ARN as the failing principal with no identity-based policy error (Mar 15) vs no resource-based policy error (Mar 16). Fix: bucket policy Principal reverted to {AWS: arn:aws:iam::SOURCE:root}. All 5 arkivalist DynamoDB tables now COMPLETED.
user_notes: Fixed cross-account DynamoDB export bucket policy after extensive debugging. Root cause: DynamoDB cross-account PITR exports use the calling IAM role credentials for S3 writes, not the dynamodb.amazonaws.com service principal. All 5 arkivalist tables now COMPLETED.

summary: Fixed cross-account DynamoDB export bucket policy (IAM root principal instead of service principal). Deployed Lambda with updated config to SSM. All 5 Arkivalist tables now successfully COMPLETED. Fixed stale bucket naming reference in serverless.yml IAM role. Added architecture overview with Mermaid diagrams (account layout, backup trigger sequence). Updated ACCOUNT_ISOLATION.md to reflect implemented design. Standardized all script docstrings with explicit account context and consistent BACKUP/SOURCE terminology.
user_notes: overview.md with mermaid diagrams, scheduling working, script tidying

summary: S3 Batch Operations fully working end-to-end cross-account: diagnosed and fixed batch role IAM (bb-* naming, ReadSource per-bucket), fixed source bucket policy via create-reader-role.py --batch-role-arn, made both setup scripts config-driven with YAML write-back. Added run state persistence (_state/last-run.json) so SKIPPED runs are visible in status. Extensive docs: retention-strategy-and-costs.md (PITR/export strategy, backup poisoning, versioning, S3 lifecycle), disaster-recovery-scenario.md (full PROD compromise playbook), backup-forensics.md (S3 versioning forensics, Athena query), cost-model.md (AWS Backup vs custom ~36-50x margin), storage-tiers.md. Removed duplicate root-level docs. Registered all new design docs in mkdocs.yml nav.
user_notes: s3 batch mode working, lots of doco updates.

summary: into new features: S3 versioning on backup buckets, restore and round-trip test commands
user_notes: S3 versioning implemented (version_retention_days=365, 0=forever). Test coverage to 80% (119 tests). Restore and round-trip test commands fully implemented and verified in situ against arkivalist: backup test restore, backup test integrity (S3+DynamoDB), backup restore run/status. 144 tests passing.

summary: Completed DynamoDB restore pipeline: pitr-watcher Lambda (SSM-based pending list, EventBridge lifecycle, tag_resource with backoff), split reader/restore IAM roles, cross-account S3 Batch restore (WriteRestore IAM + bucket policy), unified -restore suffix across S3 and DynamoDB, restore status showing Batch job progress. Verified end-to-end against Arkivalist. Docs site refactor: mermaid fix, mkdocs-click wiring, nav reorder (Design→Architecture), cost table dedup, 10 stub pages filled, architecture overview split into backup/restore topology + sequence diagrams.
user_notes: complete restore refinements; update docs; ready to demo restore ops

summary: Demo prep fixes: removed Completing from batch terminal states, wired pre-built sample manifest into batch test restore, added --dry-run gate to test restore, applied batch role bucket policy to temp restore bucket, fixed dry-run PITR message to show destination table, added s3:ListBucket to restore role IAM policy and made bucket_exists treat 403 as exists
user_notes: demo fixes

summary: Completed backup event log implementation: added restore_submitted events for S3 batch and direct-copy restores, restore_completed and pitr_reenabled events from lambda_pitr_watcher, and test_restore events from test command. Updated _process_source_entries to return completed entries (3-tuple) and fixed tests accordingly.
user_notes: tuning cli setup and outputs

summary: Localised datetime support throughout CLI: accept display-format timestamps in --to-point-in-time, fix --buckets filter to match on label/source/backup name, fix duplicate dry-run S3 line, add _events/ to operational prefixes (integrity count fix), paginate list_exports for real count, localise PITR/export timestamps. Extract shared time_utils.py; schedule add/show accept and display localised times; fix UTC day-of-week for weekly cron. Update testing.md with accurate feature status.
user_notes: make local time work in cli input/outputs; minor fixes

summary: Project status review: assessed phase progress (1-2 complete, 4-5 substantially complete, 6 in progress for NSHM), production readiness (arkivalist live, NSHM blocked on cross-account IAM), security posture (reader/restore role split, ExternalId protection, no alerting yet), cost trajectory ($1700→$29/month). Identified next priorities: push+tag release, NSHM IAM setup, Phase 3 Slack alerting, parallel run date.

summary: Docs sync with as-built state: updated README phase table and features list, scheduling.md with localised --time formats, restore.md with localised --to-point-in-time formats. Created PROJECT_STATUS_MARCH_30.md. Added tests for time_utils (19 tests, 100% coverage) and event_log (18 tests, 97% coverage). Fixed month-rollback bug in event_log.py (now.replace(month-1) crashes on 29-31st of month).
user_notes: docs sync; tests for time_utils and event_log

summary: Trialled pyup skill: migrated lock file from poetry.lock to uv.lock, upgraded deps using uv --exclude-newer (1-week safety margin), applied black formatting, fixed all ruff lint errors (E501, B023, N806, B904, E402, F841), added Makefile with sync/upgrade/test/lint/fmt/check targets, updated CLAUDE.md and contributing.md for uv workflow, removed poetry.lock. Saved pyup review notes to claude-tools repo for skill improvement. Deferred 38 pre-existing mypy errors.
user_notes: used pyup successfully. Added some rules and saved these into the /pyup repo for later integration.

summary: Fixed test env pollution: added autouse _clean_env fixture in conftest.py to unset AWS_PROFILE, AWS_CONFIG_FILE, BACKUP_CONFIG_PATH before each test. Removed -v from pytest addopts to stop verbose output overriding -q flag.
user_notes: clean up test errors due to env pollution

summary: Addressed PR review feedback: centralised uv exclude-newer cooldown in [tool.uv] pyproject.toml config, simplified Makefile upgrade target, updated contributing docs. Resolved all 38 pre-existing mypy type errors across 13 source files (no-any-return, dict-item, call-arg, arg-type, assignment, union-attr, misc, import-untyped). Removed mypy || true suppression from Makefile lint target. Also updated pyup skill with uv project support. All on branch chore/fix_mypy.
